name: CANADIAN PACIFIC KANSAS CITY LTD/CN
business: Canadian Pacific Kansas City Limited owns and operates the only freight railway spanning Canada, the United States, and Mexico, providing rail and intermodal transportation services over a network of approximately 20,000 miles. The Company transports bulk commodities, merchandise freight, and intermodal traffic. Revenues are primarily derived from transporting freight, with bulk, merchandise, and intermodal representing 36%, 46%, and 18% of freight revenues respectively in 2025.
sellsTo: Energy, chemicals and plastics (including crude, LPG, chemicals, plastics) shippers
Metals, minerals and consumer products (aggregates, steel, food) customers
Domestic and international intermodal shippers (retail goods, containers)

exposures.sentence: The Company’s Grain business represented approximately 61% of bulk revenues and 22% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Coal business represented approximately 19% of bulk revenues and 7% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Potash business represented approximately 12% of bulk revenues and 4% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Fertilizers and sulphur business represented approximately 8% of bulk revenues and 3% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Forest products business represented approximately 12% of merchandise revenues and 5% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Energy, chemicals and plastics business represented approximately 43% of merchandise revenues and 20% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Metals, minerals and consumer products business represented approximately 26% of merchandise revenues and 12% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Automotive business represented approximately 19% of merchandise revenues and 9% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
The Company’s Intermodal business represented approximately 18% of total Freight revenues in 2025.
to address cyber security risks, the Company’s Enterprise Security Department implements mitigation programs that evolve with the changing technology threat environment.
